revision_priority: Add explicit `Code Review` evidence in Skills and at least one bullet, because it is the JD must-have and is currently only implied.
Rewrite the Professional Summary into exactly 3 bold-header sentences that lead with backend/platform ownership instead of the analytics transition.

revision_instructions: Do not change any immutable fields. Keep the three experience titles, companies, dates, and locations exactly as written. Rewrite `Professional Summary` into exactly 3 full sentences, each beginning with a bold header; sentence 1 should lead with backend/platform/reliability ownership and years of experience, sentence 2 should highlight Java/Go/Python, AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and explicit code-review involvement, and sentence 3 should keep the Go 2-dan achievement as the high-value decision-making signal. Add `Code Review` to `Skills` and keep the skills taxonomy compact and recruiter-readable, with each line under the word limit. In the most relevant TikTok or DiDi bullet, add one explicit code-review bullet or fold review ownership into an existing delivery bullet so the JD must-have appears in正文, not only in the skills list. For Amazon fit, add one bridge sentence or bullet that frames the work as operational workflow automation, reliability, or exception-handling infrastructure relevant to fulfillment-network systems. Remove bold from isolated structure words such as `system design` and any other non-technology nouns; keep bold only for technologies and quantitative results outside `## Skills`. Do not delete existing technical stacks; preserve them and only strengthen the evidence and framing.
